║  BELIEF    : Skill > Degree. Execution > Theory. Universe > University  ║
║  LOCATION  : Delhi, India  —  B.Sc. Mathematics Honours                 ║

<table>
<tr>
<td width="54%" valign="top">

## `> whoami --verbose`

**20. Delhi.**
**B.Sc. Mathematics Honours.**  
**AI Researcher. Data Scientist. AILM Developer.**  
**Cybersecurity Learner. Philosopher. Builder.**

No IIT tag. No connections. No shortcuts.

I teach Maths, Physics & Science to Class 9–12  
to fund my own expenses —  
and spend every remaining hour building systems  
that don't exist yet.

Studied docs from **Google · Microsoft · Oracle**  
**Meta · Terraform** — not because someone told me.  
Because I needed to understand the core.

My degree matters less than my **skill, execution,**  
**and the way I think about problems.**

Mathematics taught me how to think.  
**Building taught me how to create.**

> *"The universe is my university."*

</td>
<td width="46%" valign="top">

## `> cat id.yaml`

```yaml
name      : Ayush Kaushik
alias     : Minato95-ayu
age       : 20
city      : Delhi, India
degree    : B.Sc. Mathematics Honours
            (but skill > degree)

roles:
  - AI Researcher
  - AILM Developer  
  - Data Scientist
  - Data Engineer
  - Full Stack Engineer
  - Cybersecurity Learner
  - Philosopher & Builder
learning  : Fastest weapon I have.
            Not talent — just refuse to stop until it clicks.
mindset   : Elon Musk energy —
            fail → rebuild → ship
            universe-scale thinking

mission   : Top 1% in tech — WORLD
status    : [IN PROGRESS ████████░░]
```

</td>
</tr>
</table>

---

## `> cat /philosophy/elon_principle.txt`

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                                                                     │
│  Elon went from Zip2 → X.com → PayPal → SpaceX → Tesla → Neuralink │
│  Every "failure" was just the next build cycle.                     │
│                                                                     │
│  The pattern I follow:                                              │
│                                                                     │
│  THINK at universe scale  →  not just "get a job"                  │
│  QUESTION first principles →  why does this exist?                 │
│  SHIP despite fear         →  done > perfect                        │
│  FAIL loudly               →  every rebuild = stronger version     │
│  OBSESS                    →  72 hrs non-stop because WHY NOT      │
│                                                                     │
│  "I don't follow the path. I build the path."                      │
│                                    — Ayush Kaushik                 │
│                                                                     │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## `> cat combat_stats.log`

| STAT | VALUE | CONTEXT |
|:---|:---:|:---|
| 🔥 Longest Sprint | **72 hrs** | Non-stop. Problem refused to let me sleep. |
| ⚡ Deep Work | **16 hrs/day + half night** | Not a flex. I just like it. It's just a day. |
| 💀 Times Rebuilt | **∞** | Every rebuild made it stronger. |
| 🏟 Hackathons | **IIT Delhi** | Solo. Built working demo on phone via Termux. |
| 📊 Competitions | **Kaggle · Datathons** | Grinding. Models don't train themselves. |
| 🧠 Docs Devoured | **5 big tech** | Google · Microsoft · Oracle · Meta · Terraform |
| 🔬 Research | **AI Papers** | SOTA models · implementing from scratch |
| 🎯 Destination | **Top 1%** | Not today. But one day — and every commit is one step closer. |
| 🏢 Dream Companies | **Google · Meta · Terraform · Oracle** | Not chasing. Getting so good they come to me. |
| 🚀 Real Goal | **My own tech giant** | One that gives builders the environment, mentorship & ideology they deserve. |
| 📚 Learning Speed | **Abnormally fast** | Give me any concept — I will master it. That's not confidence, that's a pattern I've seen in myself. |
---

Agent orchestration · 3D visualization · Gemini  
Built solo. Demo ran on phone via Termux.

<td width="50%" valign="top">

### 📰 [NewsInSec](https://github.com/Minato95-ayu/news-in-sec) `● LIVE`
> Autonomous Viral Blogging Engine

2-step Gemini pipeline. Zero manual input.  
Zero employees. Infinite content. Infinite scale.

`Gemini 2.5` `Next.js` `TypeScript` `Autonomous`

</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td width="50%" valign="top">

## `> cat /timeline/journey.log`

```
[2022─23] ─── B.Sc. Maths Honours begins. Delhi.
               Teaching Class 9–12 to fund my own way.
               Curiosity turns obsession. No going back.
                 ↓
[2023]    ─── First projects. First big failures.
               Rebuilt from scratch. Failed again. Rebuilt again.
               10 failures > 100 tutorials. Always.
                 ↓
[2024]    ─── Devoured: Google · Microsoft · Oracle · Meta · Terraform docs.
               72-hour non-stop coding sprint.
               Google for Startups: Prompt to Prototype — COMPLETED ✓
                 ↓
[2025]    ─── IIT Delhi Hackathon. EUREKA built solo on phone (Termux).
               Kaggle. Datathons. AI Research papers.
               Stack: Full-Stack · AI/LLM · Data Science · Cybersecurity
                 ↓
[2026]    ─── NewsInSec LIVE. EUREKA LIVE. Adumate growing.
               Agent-v- in active development.
               Still a student. Still at 2AM. Still here.
                 ↓
[????]    ─── TOP 1% (UNIVERSE LEVEL) ......... [IN PROGRESS ████████░░]
```

## `> cat /dev/thoughts`

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                                                                  │
│  "I've failed more times than most people have tried.            │
│   Every rebuild made it stronger.                                │
│   Every failure made me sharper.                                 │
│                                                                  │
│   My degree is B.Sc. Mathematics.                                │
│   But my real education is the universe —                        │
│   every system I've broken, every doc I've read at 3AM,          │
│   every project rebuilt from zero.                               │
│                                                                  │
│   Elon didn't wait for permission to think at scale.             │
│   Neither do I."                                                 │
│                                                                  │
│                      — Ayush Kaushik, Delhi, still building      │
│                                                                  │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```
